name: my-account/user-mfa-management
title: UserMFAMgmt Component
description: A component responsible for managing Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) factors for a user. This component handles fetching the MFA access token, fetching authenticators, enrolling, and deletion of MFA factors, and manages the MFA access token. It operates in both ProxyMode (RWA) and SPA modes for authentication.

files.content: @import '@auth0/universal-components-core/styles/globals.css';
